# NatrocOS

NatrocOS is a local-first home server control plane for Debian and Ubuntu. The
repository combines a pnpm React frontend, shared TypeScript contracts, a Go
Web UI/front door, a Go gateway, a Go CLI, and early Go service boundaries. The
current direction is live backend data by default: no frontend app/store
fixtures, no browser-only login, public Web UI on port 80, and internal API
services bound to localhost by default.

## Repository

- Package manager: pnpm 11.5.2
- Workspace globs: `apps/*`, `packages/*`, `services/*`
- Active web app: `apps/web`
- Active Go Web UI/front door: `apps/webui`
- Active Go CLI: `apps/cli`
- Active Go gateway: `apps/gateway`
- Go app-management service: `apps/app-management`
- Health-only Go service boundaries: `services/user`, `services/storage`
- Active shared package: `packages/shared`
- Default data root: `/NatrocOS`
- Default Web UI URL: `http://127.0.0.1`
- Default gateway API URL: `http://127.0.0.1:8080`
- License: Apache-2.0
- Author: Natroc Team

## Primary Commands

- `pnpm dev:web` - start the Vite dev server for the web app.
- `pnpm build:web` - typecheck and build the web app.
- `pnpm lint:web` - run ESLint for the web app.
- `pnpm typecheck:shared` - typecheck shared TypeScript contracts.
- `pnpm build:go` - build all Go packages and commands.
- `pnpm test:go` - run Go tests.
- `pnpm check` - run format, shared typecheck, web lint/build, and Go tests.
- `pnpm preview:web` - preview the built web app.
- `pnpm format:check` - check repository formatting with Prettier.
- `go run ./apps/cli/cmd/natrocos -- store queue list` - list app-management
  install queue jobs through the gateway.
- `go run ./apps/cli/cmd/natrocos -- store queue process` - materialize queued
  install jobs into compose artifacts.
- `go run ./apps/cli/cmd/natrocos -- store queue deploy <job-id> --yes` -
  execute a queued install job through app-management.

## Web App

The web app is in `apps/web` and uses React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS,
Motion for React, and lucide-react icons. It implements these views:

- Login and first-owner setup through the gateway API.
- Dashboard backed by `GET /api/system/summary`.
- Apps backed by Docker data from the gateway.
- App Store backed by JSON catalog files from `/NatrocOS/store`.
- Settings backed by the active backend session and system summary.

Vite proxies `/api` and `/health` to `http://127.0.0.1:8080` unless
`VITE_NATROCOS_API_URL` is set.

## Important Paths

- [`package.json`](package.json) - root workspace scripts and dev tools.
- [`pnpm-workspace.yaml`](pnpm-workspace.yaml) - workspace package globs.
- [`apps/web/package.json`](apps/web/package.json) - web app dependencies and scripts.
- [`apps/web/src/App.tsx`](apps/web/src/App.tsx) - root client state, session handling, and view routing.
- [`apps/web/src/services/control-plane.ts`](apps/web/src/services/control-plane.ts) - frontend control-plane client interface.
- [`apps/web/src/services/http-control-plane.ts`](apps/web/src/services/http-control-plane.ts) - typed HTTP control-plane adapter.
- [`apps/web/src/data/ui.ts`](apps/web/src/data/ui.ts) - visual metadata only, not runtime data.
- [`apps/web/src/types/natrocos.ts`](apps/web/src/types/natrocos.ts) - shared frontend types.
- [`apps/web/src/components/views/login-screen.tsx`](apps/web/src/components/views/login-screen.tsx) - login and first-owner UI.
- [`apps/web/src/components/views/dashboard-view.tsx`](apps/web/src/components/views/dashboard-view.tsx) - dashboard screen.
- [`apps/web/src/components/views/apps-view.tsx`](apps/web/src/components/views/apps-view.tsx) - apps screen.
- [`apps/web/src/components/views/store-view.tsx`](apps/web/src/components/views/store-view.tsx) - app store screen.
- [`apps/web/src/components/views/settings-view.tsx`](apps/web/src/components/views/settings-view.tsx) - settings screen.
- [`apps/web/src/i18n/dictionary.ts`](apps/web/src/i18n/dictionary.ts) - locale loader.
- [`apps/web/src/i18n/locales/id_ID.json`](apps/web/src/i18n/locales/id_ID.json) - Indonesian UI copy.
- [`apps/web/src/i18n/locales/en_US.json`](apps/web/src/i18n/locales/en_US.json) - English UI copy.
- [`packages/shared/src/index.ts`](packages/shared/src/index.ts) - serializable domain and API contracts shared by frontend.
- [`go.mod`](go.mod) - Go module for backend services.
- [`apps/webui/cmd/webui/main.go`](apps/webui/cmd/webui/main.go) - Web UI/front door entrypoint, default `:80`.
- [`apps/webui/internal/server/server.go`](apps/webui/internal/server/server.go) - static SPA handler and reverse proxy to the internal API.
- [`apps/gateway/cmd/gateway/main.go`](apps/gateway/cmd/gateway/main.go) - internal gateway entrypoint, default `127.0.0.1:8080`.
- [`apps/gateway/internal/server/server.go`](apps/gateway/internal/server/server.go) - gateway routes and error mapping.
- [`apps/gateway/internal/server/live_provider.go`](apps/gateway/internal/server/live_provider.go) - live provider for Docker, `/proc`, `df`, store catalog, and file-backed auth.
- [`apps/cli/cmd/natrocos/main.go`](apps/cli/cmd/natrocos/main.go) - NatrocOS CLI entrypoint.
- [`internal/cli/cli.go`](internal/cli/cli.go) - CLI parser, API client, and command handlers.
- [`internal/natrocos/contracts.go`](internal/natrocos/contracts.go) - Go data root, route constants, and DTOs.
- [`internal/servicekit/health.go`](internal/servicekit/health.go) - shared health endpoint for service boundaries.

## Runtime

### Web UI Front Door

- Default bind address: `:80`; override with `NATROCOS_WEBUI_ADDR`.
- Default internal API target: `http://127.0.0.1:8080`; override with `NATROCOS_API_INTERNAL_URL`.
- Default static directory: `/usr/share/natrocos/www`, falling back to `apps/web/dist` for development; override with `NATROCOS_WEBUI_STATIC_DIR`.
- Proxies `/api/*` and `/health` to the internal gateway API.

### Gateway API

- Default bind address: `127.0.0.1:8080`; override with `NATROCOS_GATEWAY_ADDR`.
- Default app-management upstream: `http://127.0.0.1:8081`; override with
  `NATROCOS_APP_MANAGEMENT_INTERNAL_URL`.
- Default data root: `/NatrocOS`; override with `NATROCOS_DATA_ROOT`.
- Default store catalog: `/NatrocOS/store`; override with `NATROCOS_STORE_DIR`.
- Auth metadata path: `/NatrocOS/metadata/user.db`.
- Auth baseline: `users[]` with the first account as `owner`, later accounts as
  `user`, random access token, 24-hour session expiry, and PBKDF2-SHA256
  password hash with random salt.
- There is no `admin` role; `owner` includes full administrative capability.
- User management baseline: `GET /api/users` and `POST /api/users` require an
  owner session. Create-user requests do not accept a role; the backend assigns
  `user` for every account after the first owner.
- Docker apps are read from `docker ps -a`; start/stop/restart call the Docker
  CLI through the gateway.
- Gateway proxies `/api/app-management/*` to the internal app-management
  service so clients can keep using one API front door.
- Store install writes a persistent JSON job to
  `/NatrocOS/app-management/install-queue`.
- App-management can process queued install jobs into `/NatrocOS/apps/<app-id>`
  with a `compose.yaml` and `metadata.json`.
- App-management deploy supports dry-run by default and can run
  `docker compose -f <compose.yaml> up -d` only when the internal request
  includes `confirm: true`.
- CLI exposes `natrocos store queue list/process/deploy`; deploy defaults to
  dry-run and sends `confirm: true` only when `--yes` is passed.
- Web Store UI also reads the install queue through the gateway and exposes
  queue refresh, process queue, and dry-run deploy controls. It does not run a
  confirmed Docker deploy from the UI.
- Web Settings UI reads owner-only local users from `GET /api/users` and can
  create a new local user with `POST /api/users`; the form does not send a
  role field.
- Storage mutation, disk format/mount, Samba, MergerFS, USB automount, and
  systemd installer behavior are not implemented yet.

## i18n Rules

User-facing copy should live in JSON locale files, not directly in React
components. Locale namespaces are organized by product area:

- `common`
- `navigation`
- `login`
- `dashboard`
- `apps`
- `store`
- `settings`

Page-specific errors belong under the relevant page namespace. When adding a
new key, update both `id_ID.json` and `en_US.json`.

## Development Guidelines

- Keep the first screen as the usable app experience, not a marketing page.
- Prefer existing dependencies and patterns before adding new packages.
- Use lucide-react for icons because it is already installed.
- Put cross-app DTOs, API route names, IDs, and serializable domain contracts in `@natrocos/shared`.
- Do not add frontend runtime fixtures for apps, store catalog, users, metrics,
  node names, ports, or Docker images.
- Treat `/NatrocOS` as the product data root unless a test/dev override is used.
- Keep destructive behavior explicit: no disk format, permanent mount, Samba,
  MergerFS, USB automount, update, or uninstall mutation without dry-run and
  confirmation behavior.

## Current Status

The frontend builds against the live HTTP control-plane client. The gateway
serves real system summary data where the host provides Linux/Docker runtime
interfaces, and it degrades to empty/unavailable values instead of frontend
fixtures. Validate the current baseline with `pnpm build:web` and
`pnpm test:go`; run the full repository gate with `pnpm check`.
